name: Inventory
description: Registro de productos, consulta por ID y reserva de stock

tests.name: Registers a product and retrieves it by id
Reserves stock successfully for valid quantity
Fails when reserving more than available stock

name: Sales
description: Creacion de ventas, agregar/remover items, cancelar y confirmar ventas

tests.name: Accumulates quantity and calculates correct total
Removes quantity from order and calculates correct total

name: Shared
description: Value Objects compartidos: PriceVO, validaciones de dominio

tests.name: Price Value Object: Setting price as int (10) should be 10.00
Price Value Object: Setting price as float (10.0) with one decimal should be 10.00
Price Value Object: Setting price as float (10.01) with two decimals should be 10.01
Price Value Object: Setting price with negative value (-10) in construction should throw error
